name: window-sizer
title: Window Sizer
description: Resize the focused window to pixel-perfect presets.
author: the3ash

commands.name: resize-window
commands.title: Resize Window
commands.subtitle: Window Sizer
commands.description: Resize the focused window, add custom sizes, star frequently used sizes, and get the current window size.

commands.name: apply-fav-size
commands.title: Apply Favorite Size
commands.subtitle: Window Sizer
commands.description: Set your favorite size and resize the focused window to it.

preferences.name: favWidth
preferences.title: Width
preferences.description: Width of your favorite window size

preferences.name: favHeight
preferences.title: Height
preferences.description: Height of your favorite window size

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
